summary.headline: This list offers a broad selection of well-known domestic and international reds, with solid value found in the regional European sections compared to the steeper markups on premium California Cabernets and Pinot Noirs.

recommendations.why: This Barbaresco from Giuseppe Cortese is a masterful expression of Nebbiolo, offering classic structure and elegance that effortlessly commands the Italian section of this list.
Cru Beaujolais from a benchmark producer like Desvignes provides exceptional depth and versatility for the table, making it a standout value among the French reds.
recommendations.extractedText: LOUIS-CLAUDE DESVIGNES Morgon LaVoûte Saint Vincent 2021 Beaujolais 58

recommendations.why: With excellent bottle age, this 2015 Chianti Rufina Riserva offers beautifully developed, savory Tuscan character that sets it apart from younger alternatives on the menu.
recommendations.extractedText: FATTORIA DI BASCIANO Chianti Rufina Riserva 2015 Tuscany 77

recommendations.why: This top-tier Morgon brings serious Cru Beaujolais complexity and food-friendly acidity without the premium typical of more famous French appellations on this list.
recommendations.extractedText: LOUIS-CLAUDE DESVIGNES Morgon LaVoûte Saint Vincent 2021 Beaujolais 58

recommendations.why: Vieux Télégraphe is an absolute icon of the Southern Rhône, delivering profound depth, earthy spice, and a truly premium drinking experience that justifies stepping up.
This classic Rioja balances approachable dark fruit with signature oak influence, making it a reliable and universally appealing choice for a mixed table of red drinkers.
recommendations.extractedText: MARQUES DE RISCAL Rioja Reserva 2020 Spain 64

recommendations.why: Tucked away in the global reds section, this Portuguese field blend offers fascinating mineral tension and vibrant fruit that easily outclasses more predictable choices.
While undeniably famous, this carries a significant restaurant markup, making it a less strategic choice when compared to the high-quality Bordeaux or premium Rhone options available.
